title: Just Some Things
description: A small Mod based around A new Weapon and new Dimension
body:
#### ____THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB TO WORK____

This is a Mod i've made to play with my Friends.

It currently adds  a new weapon called the reaper's scythe, a new dimension and a new Villager Type.




# Update 0.3.0

## Weapons  
### Reaper's Scythe  
#### Abilities  
The Scythe can launch Mobs away and launch you backwards when you use it on a block making it useful for trasportation.

#### Enchantments  
The Scythe also has a few enchantments which can make it much more powerful. The new enchantments can be aquired by the new villager type which can be made by giving a Villager The new Block that spawns in the new Dimension.

## New Dimension  
### general infos   
The new Dimension is called the Wasteland is only really worth going for if you need the Materials it contains. It can be reached by building a Portal with the same shape as a nether Portal out of Blackstone and lighting it with Lava.

### Materials   
The new Dimension contains a new Material called the wasteroot which can be found underground. It is needed to craft the reapers scythe(crafting Tree below). It also contains a new Structure called the graveyard which contatins a new Block needed for the Villager.
